# Njumwa Labs

> Njumwa Labs is the software, automation and data studio of Crispus Martin Njumwa — a Microsoft-certified Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations technical consultant based in Nairobi, Kenya, holding three Microsoft Solution Architect Expert certifications (D365 F&O, Azure, Power Platform). He builds, automates and maintains production systems for SMEs, startups and enterprises locally and worldwide (Kenya, United States, United Kingdom, European Union, and the Gulf), at enterprise quality and globally affordable prices.

Tagline: Automation and efficiency brought closer.

## Credentials (verified)

- Microsoft Solution Architect Expert ×3: Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations, Azure, Power Platform.
- Microsoft Associate ×5: D365 F&O Developer, Power Platform Developer, Azure Administrator, Power BI Data Analyst, Fabric Analytics Engineer.
- AI/Data/Foundations: Microsoft AI Business Professional; Career Essentials in Generative AI; Machine Learning Specialization (DeepLearning.AI / Stanford); CS50 Python (Harvard / edX).
- Real delivery: technical components on a 200+ user Dynamics 365 F&O insurance ERP go-live across General Ledger, AR, AP, Fixed Assets, Inventory and Procurement.
- BSc Computer Science, Egerton University. Currently D365 F&O Developer at Impax Business Solutions, Nairobi.

## Services

- Web development — websites, web apps, SaaS, e-commerce, APIs; React, Next.js, Astro, Node.js, Python; SEO and Core Web Vitals. https://njumwalabs.com/services/web-development/
- AI automation — chatbots & support agents, AI lead generation, workflow automation (n8n/Make/Zapier), document processing, voice AI, RAG copilots. https://njumwalabs.com/services/ai-automation/
- Mobile apps — cross-platform (Flutter, React Native) and native iOS/Android, MVPs, payments including M-Pesa, app store launch. https://njumwalabs.com/services/mobile-apps/
- Database administration — performance tuning, backups & DR, high availability, migrations, managed DBA; SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Oracle, Redis. https://njumwalabs.com/services/database-administration/
- Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations — X++ (Chain of Command), integrations, DMF data migration, SSRS & Electronic Reporting, Power BI, upgrades, security, Power Platform. https://njumwalabs.com/services/dynamics-365-finance-operations/

## Pricing summary

Globally affordable, transparent. Projects from ~$600; product builds from ~$1,800; managed retainers from ~$300/month; consulting (incl. D365 F&O) from ~$45/hour. Prices in USD; local (KES) and custom pricing available.

## FAQ

- Where is Njumwa Labs based? Nairobi, Kenya — serving clients worldwide, with time-zone-friendly delivery.
- What makes Crispus credible for D365 work? Three Microsoft Solution Architect Expert certifications and technical delivery on a 200+ user enterprise insurance ERP go-live.
- How fast is the first response? Within one business day, usually faster.
- How do engagements start? With a free discovery call, then a clear written scope, timeline and price.
